ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contaminants" (
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contaminant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contaminant */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the contaminant's level */,
  "likely_source" TEXT /* Description of likely sources of the contaminant */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the contaminant */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the contaminant */,
  "toxicity_level" TEXT /* Toxicity level of the contaminant */,
  "regulatory_standard" TEXT /* Reference to the regulatory standard (e.g., EPA, WHO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who collected the sample */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during sample collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_contaminants" (
  "sample_contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample-contaminant entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water sample */,
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contaminant */,
  "average_level" REAL /* Average level of the contaminant in the sample */,
  "level_range" TEXT /* Range of levels detected for the contaminant */,
  "secondary_limit" REAL /* Secondary limit for the contaminant (if applicable) */,
  "violation_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the contaminant level is in violation of regulatory standards */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the contaminant */,
  "detection_limit" REAL /* Detection limit for the contaminant */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the measurement of the contaminant level */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the water sample analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_contaminants_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_contaminants_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of water source (e.g., river, lake, groundwater) */,
  "water_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water source (if applicable) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection at the site */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, ad-hoc) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_samples" (
  "report_sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-sample entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water sample included in the report */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample in the report (e.g., included, excluded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_samples_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES water_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_samples_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sample_contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample-contaminant entry */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., violation, warning) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sample_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_contaminant_id") REFERENCES sample_contaminants ("sample_contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the treatment plan is implemented */,
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contaminant that the treatment plan addresses */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "treatment_method" TEXT /* Method used in the treatment plan */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the treatment plan */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_contaminants" (
  "plan_contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-contaminant entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan */,
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contaminant that the treatment plan addresses */,
  "target_level" REAL /* Target level of the contaminant to be achieved by the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_contaminants_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_contaminants_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was inspected */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with regulatory standards */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the inspection */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of any violations found during the inspection */,
  "corrective_action" TEXT /* Corrective action taken to address violations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_contaminants" (
  "site_contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-contaminant entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contaminant detected at the site */,
  "first_detected_date" TEXT /* Date when the contaminant was first detected */,
  "last_detected_date" TEXT /* Date when the contaminant was last detected */,
  "detection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of detection of the contaminant at the site (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_contaminants_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_contaminants_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id")
)
